items.definition_en: A printer is a machine that makes copies of documents on paper.
items.example_en: We used the office printer to print the report.

items.definition_en: A computer is an electronic device used to store and work with information.
items.example_en: She works on her computer every day at the office.

items.definition_en: A laptop is a small computer you can carry with you.
items.example_en: He brought his laptop to the meeting.

items.definition_en: A mouse is a small device used to move the pointer on a computer screen.
items.example_en: She clicked with the mouse to open the file.

items.definition_en: A keyboard is a set of keys used to enter information into a computer.
items.example_en: He typed his password on the keyboard.

items.definition_en: A monitor is a screen that shows what you are doing on a computer.
items.example_en: The office monitor is very big.

items.definition_en: A projector is a machine that shows pictures or videos on a wall or screen.
items.example_en: We used the projector for the presentation.

items.definition_en: A tablet is a small computer with a touch screen.
items.example_en: He likes to write notes on his tablet.

items.definition_en: A photocopier is a machine that makes copies of documents.
items.example_en: The photocopier is next to the printer.

items.definition_en: A scanner is a machine that puts pictures or documents into a computer.
items.example_en: She scanned the letter using the scanner.

items.definition_en: A phone is a device that people use to talk to each other.
items.example_en: He answered the phone quickly.

items.definition_en: A headset is a set of headphones with a microphone.
items.example_en: She wore a headset during the online meeting.

items.definition_en: A desktop computer is a computer that stays on a desk.
items.example_en: The office has a desktop computer in every room.

items.definition_en: Speakers are devices that make sound louder so people can hear it.
items.example_en: The speakers are used for video calls.

items.definition_en: A router is a device that connects computers to the internet.
items.example_en: The router is in the main office room.

items.definition_en: A flash drive is a small device for storing digital files.
items.example_en: She saved her work on a flash drive.

items.definition_en: A server is a computer that shares information with other computers.
items.example_en: The company has a new server for its data.

items.definition_en: A webcam is a camera that connects to a computer for video calls.
items.example_en: He turned on the webcam to join the meeting.

items.definition_en: A charger is a device that gives power to electronics.
items.example_en: Her laptop charger was on the desk.

items.definition_en: A smartboard is an electronic board used to write and show information.
items.example_en: The team made notes on the smartboard.
